filePurposes.polyfills.js: Polyfills for Array.prototype.indexOf, Object.keys, Date.now, String.prototype.trim; sets globalThis.__POLYFILLS_READY__ as readiness flag
filePurposes.storage.js: Token storage abstraction (localStorage with cookie fallback) supporting getToken, setToken, clearAll; exposed via __STORAGE__
filePurposes.config.js: Decodes base64-encoded config values and initializes SDK config (API_ENDPOINT, API_SALT, VERIFY_KEY, FEATURE_ENABLED); exposed via __CONFIG__
filePurposes.crypto.js: MD5 hashing implementation (4-round Feistel compression) with hex nonce generator; exposed via __MD5__
filePurposes.signer.js: Request signing engine: sorts params, builds sign string (params+salt+nonce+ts), MD5 hashes; exposed via __signRequest__
filePurposes.client.js: SDK entry point: orchestrates config→crypto→signer→storage, signs params, sends XHR POST, caches tokens

dependencies.mechanism: reads globalThis.__MD5__ for hash() and generateNonce()

dataFlow: polyfills→config (decodes base64 values)→crypto (provides MD5+nonce)→signer (reads CONFIG.SALT + MD5, builds sign string sorted_keys|timestamp|nonce|salt → MD5)→client (orchestrates: reads CONFIG/SIGNER/STORAGE, signs params, sends XHR POST to API_ENDPOINT, caches auth_token/refresh_token)
